name: bug
description: Something is broken or behaving incorrectly.

name: ready-for-codex
description: Structured report that is ready for Codex triage.

name: crashcount-app
description: Issue affects the Crashcount iPhone app.

name: needs-info
description: More detail is needed before the bug can be reproduced.

name: confirmed
description: The bug has been reproduced or otherwise confirmed.

name: fixed
description: A fix has landed or been shipped.

name: duplicate
description: This report matches an existing issue.
